mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.workflow_id, s.name, s.description, s.schedule_type, s.cron_expression, s.interval_seconds, s.scheduled_time, s.input_params, s.status, s.last_run_at, s.next_run_at, s.run_count, s.created_by, s.created_at, s.updated_at, d.name AS workflow_name FROM workflow_schedule s LEFT JOIN workflow_definition d ON s.workflow_id = d.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_schedule (workflow_id, name, description, schedule_type, cron_expression, interval_seconds, scheduled_time, input_params, status, next_run_at, run_count, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{workflowId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{scheduleType}, #{cronExpression}, #{intervalSeconds}, #{scheduledTime}, #{inputParams}, #{status}, #{nextRunAt}, #{runCount}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_schedule SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.workflow_id, s.name, s.description, s.schedule_type, s.cron_expression, s.interval_seconds, s.scheduled_time, s.input_params, s.status, s.last_run_at, s.next_run_at, s.run_count, s.created_by, s.created_at, s.updated_at, d.name AS workflow_name FROM workflow_schedule s LEFT JOIN workflow_definition d ON s.workflow_id = d.id WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.next_run_at IS NOT NULL AND s.next_run_at <= NOW() ORDER BY s.next_run_at ASC
